query:
SELECT GREATEST(
            COALESCE(MAX(created_at), TIMESTAMPTZ '1970-01-01 00:00:00+00'),
            COALESCE(MAX(modified_at), TIMESTAMPTZ '1970-01-01 00:00:00+00'),
            COALESCE(MAX(deleted_at), TIMESTAMPTZ '1970-01-01 00:00:00+00')
        ) as last_change
        FROM messages WHERE channel_id = $1
